channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘I spend $7,500 a month’: I’m 47, earn $260K, and have $3 million. Can I retire at 50?
item.description: “I own a home worth $520,000 and do not have a mortgage on it.”

item.title: If Intermittent Fasting Isn't Working for You, Science Says You're Not Alone

item.title: Global Entry halted, TSA PreCheck remains open amid partial government shutdown
item.description: The TSA plans to keep PreCheck open after reports suggested the fast-tracked lanes could be closed amid the federal government shutdown.

item.title: What Is Coconut Sugar? Here's The Deal On This Cane Sugar Alternative

item.title: United's new MileagePlus reality: Cardholders win, others lose ground
item.description: United Airlines shook up its loyalty program this week with new incentives for credit cardholders, and hurdles for those who don't carry a card.
